# rasuvaeff/yii3-metrics-prometheus

Prometheus backend for `rasuvaeff/yii3-metrics`: records the core `MetricRegistry`
into `promphp/prometheus_client_php` and exposes `/metrics`. Namespace
`Rasuvaeff\Yii3MetricsPrometheus`.

## Install

```bash
composer require rasuvaeff/yii3-metrics-prometheus
```

Needs `ext-apcu` or `ext-redis` for multi-worker php-fpm.

## Rules

- Installing this binds the swappable core `MeterProviderInterface =>
  PrometheusMeterProvider`. Do NOT also bind it (or `RouteResolverInterface`) —
  `yiisoft/config` Duplicate key. `SanitizingRouteResolver` is opt-in (app rebinds
  `RouteResolverInterface`).
- `CollectorRegistry` is built with `registerDefaultMetrics: false` (no `php_info`).
- Label values are positioned by DECLARED label-name order (`Internal\Labels`),
  never the sorted `LabelSet` map. A counter rejects a negative increment.
- Multiprocess storage required for php-fpm (`InMemory` is per-worker; selecting
  it under fpm raises E_USER_WARNING): use `apcng` (recommended) / `apcu` /
  `redis` / `predis` / `pdo` via `StorageFactory`.
- Undeclared label name in a LabelSet at record time => InvalidArgumentException
  (typo guard); missing declared label renders as "".

## API

### Wiring / provider

```php
use Prometheus\CollectorRegistry;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Metrics\MetricRegistry;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3MetricsPrometheus\{PrometheusMeterProvider, StorageFactory};

$storage  = (new StorageFactory())->create('apcng');       // 'in_memory' | 'apcu' | 'apcng' | 'redis' | 'predis' | 'pdo'
// pdo: (new StorageFactory())->create('pdo', ['dsn' => 'mysql:host=db;dbname=app',
//   'username' => ..., 'password' => ..., 'prefix' => 'prometheus_']); unknown adapter throws
$registry = new CollectorRegistry($storage, false);        // false = no default metrics
$metrics  = new MetricRegistry(new PrometheusMeterProvider($registry));

$metrics->counter('http_server_requests_total', 'help', ['method', 'route', 'status'])
    ->inc(1.0, new \Rasuvaeff\Yii3Metrics\LabelSet(['method' => 'GET', 'route' => '/x', 'status' => '200']));
```

### /metrics endpoint (PSR-15)

```php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3MetricsPrometheus\{MetricsEndpoint, PrometheusRenderer};

$endpoint = new MetricsEndpoint($collectorRegistry, $psr17ResponseFactory);
// Content-Type: text/plain; version=0.0.4

echo (new PrometheusRenderer())->render($collectorRegistry); // raw exposition
```

### Cardinality (opt-in)

```php
// config/common/di.php
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3Metrics\RouteResolverInterface;
use Rasuvaeff\Yii3MetricsPrometheus\SanitizingRouteResolver;

return [RouteResolverInterface::class => SanitizingRouteResolver::class];
// /users/123 -> /users/:id ; UUIDs -> :uuid
```

### Storage / env

`PROMETHEUS_STORAGE` = `in_memory` (default) | `apcu` | `apcng` | `redis` | `predis` | `pdo`. `PROMETHEUS_NAMESPACE` prefixes every metric name. `StorageFactory::
create(string $adapter, array $options = []): Prometheus\Storage\Adapter`.
